name: Cherry-Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Spray twelve 2 3/4-inch muffin cups with nonstick cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, oats, orange peel, and baking powder. Add cherries and toss. In a small bowl, mix water, the juice, oil, egg, and vanilla. Gradually add the liquid ingredients to the dry mixture; stir until just combined. Do not overmix.
3. Pour batter evenly into prepared cups. Sprinkle sugar on top of each muffin. Bake for 12 - 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from pan and place on a rack to cool.
Each serving provides: 1 fat-gram, 1.5 protein grams, 1 fiber gram, 10 carbohydrates grams. Per serving: 228 calories, 6g protein, 6g fat, 38g carbohydrates, 117mg sodium, 18mg cholesterol.
